description: Capabilities for the popover and Settings windows. The popover reaches the gateway by direct loopback fetch (never IPC); its only Rust commands are the app-defined set in commands.rs (set_tray_state, service_control, open_target, open_settings, notify), which need no plugin permission. Settings additionally drives the autostart plugin (launch at login). Core window show/hide/focus/close is all the plugin surface either window uses; the Keychain glue lands in Phase 4.
